name: Salmon Poached in Champagne with Capers and Tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the fillets and place them in a shallow pan large enough to hold them in one layer.
2. Add the champagne, lemon juice, and enough water to just cover the fillets.
3. Remove the fish from the poaching liquid and bring it to a boil.
4. Lay the fish back in the pan in a single layer and top with the onion slices, capers, tarragon, and pepper.
5. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 4 to 6 minutes, depending on the thickness of the fish.
6. Fish is done when mostly opaque but still barely transparent at the very center.
7. Remove fish from the liquid, along with onions, capers, and tarragon.
8. Drain well and serve immediately on warmed plates.
This recipe provides: Calories 256, protein 29 g, carbohydrate 5 g, sodium 102 mg, cholesterol 105 mg, fat 5 g (19% of calories from fat).
